name: shieldpipe
description: Privacy middleware for LLM & AI pipelines — PII detection, pseudonymization, and rehydration

scripts.test: node -e "const { PIIDetector } = require('./dist/detector'); const d = new PIIDetector(); const { result } = d.pseudonymize('alice@acme.com'); if (result === 'EMAIL_1') { console.log('Test Passed'); process.exit(0); } else { console.error('Test Failed:', result); process.exit(1); }"
